steps.title: Use the best-fit line
steps.content: The question asks for the temperature predicted by the line of best fit, so read the $y$-value on the line when the distance is $4{,}000$ feet.

steps.title: Read the predicted value
steps.content: At $x=4{,}000$, the line of best fit has a temperature of about $35^\circ\text{F}$. The answer is B.
